text: Resume is tailored to target internship

display_text.en: Resume is tailored to target internship
display_text.zh: 简历已根据目标实习岗位调整
display_text.ms: Resume disesuaikan dengan latihan industri sasaran

text: Has at least one related academic or personal project

display_text.en: Has at least one related academic or personal project
display_text.zh: 至少有一个相关课程或个人项目
display_text.ms: Mempunyai sekurang-kurangnya satu projek akademik atau peribadi berkaitan

text: Has GitHub, portfolio, or project showcase

display_text.en: Has GitHub, portfolio, or project showcase
display_text.zh: 有 GitHub、作品集或项目展示
display_text.ms: Mempunyai GitHub, portfolio, atau paparan projek

text: Understands basic AI, data, or software concepts

display_text.en: Understands basic AI, data, or software concepts
display_text.zh: 理解基础 AI、数据或软件概念
display_text.ms: Memahami konsep asas AI, data, atau perisian
Pernah berlatih soalan temu duga latihan industri

text: Can introduce self and project in English

display_text.en: Can introduce self and project in English
display_text.zh: 能用英文介绍自己和项目
display_text.ms: Boleh memperkenalkan diri dan projek dalam bahasa Inggeris

display_text.zh: 清楚知道目标实习岗位
display_text.ms: Mengetahui peranan latihan industri sasaran dengan jelas

text: Has applied to at least 5 companies

display_text.en: Has applied to at least 5 companies
display_text.zh: 已申请至少 5 家公司

text: Has previous work, club, volunteer, freelance, or project experience

display_text.en: Has previous work, club, volunteer, freelance, or project experience
display_text.zh: 有工作、社团、志愿、自由职业或项目经验
display_text.ms: Mempunyai pengalaman kerja, kelab, sukarelawan, bebas, atau projek

text: Has prepared LinkedIn or professional profile

display_text.en: Has prepared LinkedIn or professional profile
display_text.zh: 已准备 LinkedIn 或专业档案
display_text.ms: Telah menyediakan LinkedIn atau profil profesional
Boleh menerangkan projek teknikal dengan jelas

text: Has researched company and job requirements

display_text.en: Has researched company and job requirements
display_text.zh: 已研究公司和岗位要求
display_text.ms: Telah menyelidik syarikat dan keperluan kerja

text: Has not applied to companies yet

display_text.en: Has not applied to companies yet

text: Has applied to fewer than 5 companies

display_text.en: Has applied to fewer than 5 companies
display_text.zh: 已申请少于 5 家公司

text: Has prepared transcript or academic documents

display_text.en: Has prepared transcript or academic documents
display_text.zh: 已准备成绩单或学术文件
display_text.ms: Telah menyediakan transkrip atau dokumen akademik

text: Has two or more related projects

display_text.en: Has two or more related projects
display_text.zh: 有两个或以上相关项目
display_text.ms: Mempunyai dua atau lebih projek berkaitan
Mempunyai projek atau demo yang telah diterbitkan

text: Has Python, Java, or SQL basics

display_text.en: Has Python, Java, or SQL basics
display_text.zh: 具备 Python、Java 或 SQL 基础
display_text.ms: Mempunyai asas Python, Java, atau SQL

display_text.zh: 理解 Git 版本控制

display_text.ms: Pernah berlatih temu duga tingkah laku

text: Uses STAR method for behavioral answers

display_text.en: Uses STAR method for behavioral answers
display_text.zh: 使用 STAR 方法回答行为面试题
display_text.ms: Menggunakan kaedah STAR untuk jawapan tingkah laku

text: Understands required skills for target role

display_text.en: Understands required skills for target role
display_text.zh: 理解目标岗位所需技能
display_text.ms: Memahami kemahiran yang diperlukan untuk peranan sasaran

text: Sends follow-up email after application or interview

display_text.en: Sends follow-up email after application or interview
display_text.zh: 申请或面试后发送跟进邮件
display_text.ms: Menghantar e-mel susulan selepas permohonan atau temu duga

text: Has teamwork and time management experience

display_text.en: Has teamwork and time management experience
display_text.zh: 具备团队合作和时间管理经验
display_text.ms: Mempunyai pengalaman kerja berpasukan dan pengurusan masa
